title: Ceramic Blue Mosaic
description: Premium handcrafted ceramic tile with intense cobalt blue glaze and subtle cracking effects. Perfect for luxury bathroom backsplashes and dynamic wet room feature walls.
creator: Enzo Moretti Design

title: Pristine Carrara Marble
description: Luxury natural Italian Carrara marble featuring elegant sweeping gray veining on a pristine white crystalline background. Honed finish for timeless, high-end architecture.
creator: Toscana Quarry House

title: Terracotta Earth Hexagon
description: Rustic reclaimed dynamic hexagonal tiles in warm ochre, brick-red, and deep clay tones. Sun-dried and kiln-baked using traditional Spanish estate methods.
creator: Barcelona Heritage

title: Venetian Terrazzo Emerald
description: Contemporary composition of vibrant green glass fragments, pristine marble chips, and quartz aggregates bound in ultra-durable concrete.
creator: Venezia Labs

title: Basalt Lava Slate
description: Volcanic split-face charcoal basalt wall tiles featuring rich, micro-porous textures and deep geological dark layers.
creator: Nordic Rock Co.

title: Zellige Amber Glaze
description: Traditional Moroccan hand-molded clay tiles with high-shade variations in amber, honey, and caramel, presenting beautiful natural irregularities and high organic glaze.
creator: Atlas Craft Guild

title: Calacatta Gold Marble
description: Prestigious Italian marble displaying bold, thick gray veining interwoven with brilliant gold accents on a pure crystalline white background. The absolute peak of sophisticated flooring.
creator: Fior Di Carrara

title: Sage Crackle Subway
description: Restful sage green ceramic subway tile featuring a glossy surface with an intentional micro-crackle glaze. Imbues kitchens or showers with a serene botanical atmosphere.
creator: Enzo Moretti Design

title: Andalusian Indigo Star
description: Exquisite Spanish hand-painted interlacing star and cross pattern tile set in historic indigo blue and creamy white. Evokes historical Mediterranean palaces and courtyards.
creator: Sevilla Artisans

title: Terrazzo Pearl Blush
description: Feminine, high-contrast modern terrazzo with an off-white concrete base loaded with pastel pink, rose, peach, and white quartz aggregates. High-durability luxury composite.
creator: Venezia Labs

title: Silver Travertine Slate
description: Richly striated natural travertine cut along the vein to produce continuous horizontal bands of charcoal, silver-grey, pewter, and soft beige. Splendid raw finish.
creator: Toscana Quarry House

title: Nero Marquina Black
description: High-purity Spanish deep-black marble featuring erratic, jagged lightning-white calcite veins slicing through its beautiful dark surface. Elegantly polished to a mirror shine.
creator: Iberian Stone Planners

title: Handmade Ochre Square
description: Earthy, rustic square clay tiles with rich marbling of solar yellow and desert sand. Gently uneven surfaces play with natural ambient light to create cozy rustic vibes.
creator: Atlas Craft Guild

title: Obsidian Terrazzo Midnight
description: A dark cosmic visual composition. Intensely black concrete base peppered with iridescent mother-of-pearl flakes and mirror-glass crystals that shimmer with every step.
creator: Venezia Labs

title: Ocean Wave Emerald Glaze
description: Handmolded fishscale fan tiles glazed in beautiful shades of deep ocean blue, maritime teal, and seaweed emerald. Handcrafted to resemble gentle rhythmic waves.
creator: Barcelona Heritage

title: Rusty Quartzite Slate
description: Split-face natural slate containing minerals of gold, rust, and copper oxide that shift with ambient sunlight. Perfect for architectural exterior panels or fireplace frames.
creator: Nordic Rock Co.
